message:
Extend comptime bridge, convert http.zig (73% reduction)

- Add FieldAccessCallSpec for field access patterns (http.get().body)
- http.zig: 37 → 10 lines using bridge
- async.zig: genAsyncioCreateTask now uses bridge
- json.zig: unchanged (requires type inference, bridge incompatible)
- Add M5: Package Manager milestone to CLAUDE.md
